meaning: adj.联合的,联想的,[数]结合的
examples: The associative guilt was ingrained in his soul.
Their paintings often become segmented capsules of associative experiences.
The Greeks discovered that human memory is largely an associative process that it works by linking things together.
Encourage lateral or associative thinking by rubbing together different groups, cultures, skill sets, and department silos.
"This is an associative, collective game and the vehicle to express that is the pass, " Mr. Lillo said.
